results.title: Doja Cat says viral leaked songs are AI, not her real tracks
results.description: Doja Cat has denied that recently leaked songs circulating online are real recordings from her catalogue. The singer said the tracks are AI-made after fans linked them to a possible deluxe edition of Vie.

results.title: City Sounds lights up Luxembourg’s National Day
results.description: US pop band OneRepublic performed in the capital on Tuesday as part of a line-up that also featured Germany’s ClockClock and local acts Tali and Oke

results.title: Free family event at Sanilac museum features music, animals
results.description: Live music, animal presentations and tours highlight a free family event at Sanilac Museum on July 3 in Port Sanilac.

results.title: Free food, games and haircuts await at City Kids Day in Battle Creek
results.description: Battle Creek’s City Kids Day is June 27 with free admission, food, games, toys, haircuts, live music and more for local youth and families.
